name: Watermelon Preserves
recipeInstructions:
1. Pare and cut watermelon rind into pieces that are 2 inches long and 3/4 inch wide.
2. Cover the rind pieces with brine made by dissolving 1 tablespoon salt in 1 quart water. Let stand overnight.
3. Drain the rind pieces.
4. Cover the drained rind pieces with water and boil for 10 minutes.
5. Drain again.
6. Cover the drained rind pieces with a heavy syrup made of 1 part sugar and 1 part water. Add 1 thinly sliced lemon to each 3 quarts of rind.
7. Add whole spices if desired.
8. Cook slowly until the rind is tender and clear.
(Note: This recipe was provided by Cathy Svitek from the recipe files of Sylvia Steiger.)
